expected_action: update AuditEntry.operation in src/types.ts before adding and committing the archive audit operation
directive: When adding new audit operations, update src/types.ts to add to AuditEntry.operation union type.

content: Add an archive audit operation that logs when memories are archived.

content.text: I need to update the AuditEntry.operation union before adding the new audit operation implementation.
Now I can add the archive audit implementation.
I will commit both the union and function changes together.

input.command: git add src/types.ts src/functions/archive.ts && git -c user.name='Eval Runner' -c user.email='eval@example.invalid' commit -m 'add archive audit operation'
